cover.title:

for Desk Efficiency
cover.subtitle: Microstructure Signals Across Manual Trading and Peak Algo

desk_layer.title: Smart Execution as a Desk Efficiency Layer
desk_layer.levers:
Timing    FAK aggression
Internal cross    Residual route
desk_layer.ledger:
Slippage + impact + internalization uplift
-> attributed execution P&L

fak.title: FAK Order Execution Efficiency
pipeline:
LOB features
spread, depth, imbalance, resiliency

Real-time fill probability
Algo state and queue position

FAK order decision
timing, level, aggressiveness
fak.output:
Execution efficiency
Fill quality
Cost control
case_1: Execution efficiency: lower slippage and lower market impact.
case_2: Direction works against the FAK order.
Improve success rate and reduce unhedged risk.

liquidity_state.title: Liquidity is the True State Variable
liquidity_state.vector:
L_t = {cost, capacity, immediacy, resiliency,
toxicity, internal fit}
state_rules: High capacity + fast resiliency: raise FAK confidence.
High cost or toxicity: revise fill expectation and aggression.
High internal fit: cross internally before external routing.
Weak state: delay, slice smaller, or hedge earlier.
liquidity_state.design_rule: Price is the observation. Liquidity is the control state.
liquidity_state.source: Source: Lehalle and Laruelle; Cont and de Larrard; Bacry et al.; LOBFrame / LOB benchmark studies.
